metadata.title: Summits and Conferences in Current Affairs MCQs

questions.question: Which state is the host of South India Natural Farming Summit 2025?
questions.explanation: Recently, it was announced that Prime Minister Narendra Modi will visit Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, on 19 November. He will address the South India Natural Farming Summit, which will be hosted by the Farmers’ Associations in Tamil Nadu. The summit will also bring together 50 scientists specialising in organic agriculture. It aims to frame policies to expand natural farming across southern states. The summit seeks to build a people-driven movement for economically viable and socially inclusive agriculture. It will feature 300 exhibition stalls, live demonstrations, policy discussions and youth–women engagement. It is supported by national initiatives like Bharatiya Prakritik Krishi Paddhati and Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana.

questions.question: Where was the 3rd International Ayurveda Conference 2025 held?
questions.explanation: In November 2025, Dinesh Bhatia, Ambassador of India to Brazil, inaugurated the 3rd International Ayurveda Conference in Sao Paulo, Brazil. The conference was jointly organized by Swami Vivekananda Cultural Centre (SVCC) and Conayur Sao Paulo (Conselho Nacional de Ayurveda). The conference was held from 14–15 November 2025. It marked 40 years of Ayurveda practice in Brazil. Brazil is the first South American country to officially recognize Ayurveda. The 2025 theme was “Diversity and Inclusion in Ayurveda: Caring for Everybody and Every Being”. The event was held under the patronage of the Indian Council for Cultural Relations (ICCR).

questions.question: Which Indian city is the venue of 10th Global Economic Summit (GES) 2025?
questions.explanation: The World Trade Centre (WTC) Mumbai and the All-India Association of Industries (AIAI) will host the 10th Global Economic Summit (GES) and 6th World Trade Expo on 21–22 November in Mumbai. The event is supported by the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME), Government of Maharashtra and Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA). The theme is “Accelerating Global Trade” with discussions, exhibitions and B2B meetings to boost partnerships and resilient value chains.

questions.question: What is the theme of the Earth Summit 2025–26?

options.label: D
options.text: Empowering Rural Innovation for Global Change

answer.label: D
answer.text: Empowering Rural Innovation for Global Change

questions.explanation: NABARD (National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development) and IAMAI (Internet and Mobile Association of India) recently organized the first Earth Summit 2025-26 in Hyderabad on 20–21 November with the theme Empowering Rural Innovation for Global Change. The second edition is scheduled for Gandhinagar on 5–6 December 2025, and the third for New Delhi in February 2026. The summit served as a global platform to drive policy outcomes, investments, and collaborations for rural transformation.

questions.question: Which state public service commission hosted the 2025 National Conference of State Public Service Commission (PSC)?
questions.explanation: The 2025 National Conference of State Public Service Commission (PSC) Chairpersons is hosted by Telangana PSC on December 19–20 to discuss systemic issues affecting recruitment. State PSC exams often face controversies and court cases, causing delays and creating a trust deficit among aspirants. PSCs originated during the freedom struggle; first Public Service Commission was created in 1926, and Government of India Act 1935 established PSCs for provinces — continued in the Constitution. UPSC works in a politically neutral environment, with highly experienced and merit-based members from all regions; appointments usually above age 55.

questions.question: Where was World Telecommunication Development Conference 2025 (WTDC-25) held?
questions.explanation: The World Telecommunication Development Conference 2025 (WTDC-25) was held in Baku, Azerbaijan and concluded on 28 November 2025. It was organized by International Telecommunication Union – Development Sector (ITU-D). The conference sets global telecom development strategies. Around 2,300 delegates attended, including over 65 ministers and heads of agencies. India held leadership roles, influenced key resolutions on digital transformation, ICT security, spectrum management, disaster management, environment, and inclusion, and promoted C-DOT indigenous technologies.

questions.question: Which city is the venue of 7th India International Seaweed Expo and Summit 2026?
questions.explanation: Indian Council of Agricultural Research-Central Marine Fisheries Research Institute (ICAR–CMFRI), Kochi will host the 7th India International Seaweed Expo and Summit 2026 on 29–30 January 2026. It is jointly organised by the Indian Chamber of Commerce, CMFRI, and CSIR–Central Salt Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSMCRI). It is one of the largest global seaweed industry gatherings. Participants from Brazil, Sri Lanka, Netherlands, Sweden, and many other countries will attend. It will promote international partnerships, technology transfer, and global market linkages.

questions.question: Which state is the host of Rising Global Summit 2025?
questions.explanation: Telangana hosted the Rising Global Summit 2025 in Hyderabad on 8 December. The two-day summit features 27 sessions on energy, Information Technology (IT), healthcare, and startups. Major organisations like World Health Organization (WHO), World Bank, Asian Development Bank (ADB) and United Nations Children’s Fund (UNICEF) are involved. The summit aims to position Telangana as a global growth and innovation hub.

questions.question: Which ministry organised the Rising Northeast Investors Summit 2025?

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

answer.label: C
answer.text: Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region

questions.explanation: The Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region (MDoNER) organized the Rising Northeast Investors Summit 2025 to boost trade and investment in the North Eastern Region. The summit focused on attracting investments in sectors such as tourism and hospitality, agro-food processing and allied areas, textiles, handloom and handicrafts, healthcare, education and skill development, entertainment and sports, infrastructure and logistics, and energy. The summit, along with pre-event roadshows, attracted investment interests worth ₹ 4.48 lakh crore.

questions.question: Where was National Conference for Chairpersons of Public Service Commissions inaugurated?
questions.explanation: President Droupadi Murmu inaugurated the National Conference for Chairpersons of Public Service Commissions in Hyderabad, Telangana on 19 December 2025. Public Service Commissions must uphold ideals of equality, justice and welfare as guided by Preamble, Fundamental Rights and Directive Principles. Commissions should ensure equality of opportunity and aim for equality of outcomes. They act as change agents promoting equity and support permanent executive continuity. Civil servants must be sensitive to women, marginalised and vulnerable groups; gender sensitisation required. Strong, effective governance is needed as India targets becoming third-largest economy and achieving Viksit Bharat by 2047.
